docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, CAROLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL $1,340.14 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,370.14, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $625.00 AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, CAROLYN
